creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The pointyhat[1] and I can't reproduce it. You need to make sure you have all 
ports tree up to date and included your installed ports. Also, you need to 
make sure you have www/mozilla/files/patch-gfx_src_ps_nsType1.cpp. Please 
follow "1. When should I make a bug report?" in the 
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html first before you report any 
of bug to us again. 

BTW: You might have to change CVSup mirror if you still don't get that 
www/mozilla/files/patch-gfx_src_ps_nsType1.cpp. 

[1] http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-6-latest-logs/mozilla-1.7.13_1,2.log
